proposals.description: Reduce base transaction fee from 100 to 50 SOV This change was proposed to address concerns about network throughput. Implementation requires 60817 blocks for activation after approval. Estimated impact: 39192 active nodes affected.
proposals.title: Reduce base transaction fee from 100 to 50 SOV

proposals.description: Increase maximum block size to 2MB This change was proposed to address concerns about cross-shard latency. Implementation requires 91432 blocks for activation after approval. Estimated impact: 44136 active nodes affected.
proposals.title: Increase maximum block size to 2MB
